# Angular + Tailwind CSS Project Setup

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file created
- [x] Project requirements clarified: Angular with Tailwind CSS
- [x] Scaffold the Angular project
- [x] Install and configure Tailwind CSS
- [x] Install required VS Code extensions
- [x] Verify project compiles without errors
- [x] Create development server task
- [x] Launch the project
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete

## Project Details
- Framework: Angular 21
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 3
- Package Manager: npm
- Location: `/crud-angular` directory

## Setup Summary
✅ Created Angular project with routing enabled
✅ Installed Tailwind CSS v3 with PostCSS and Autoprefixer
✅ Configured Tailwind CSS with Angular
✅ Updated global styles to include Tailwind directives
✅ Successfully compiled the project without errors
